special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Core beat 'em up mechanic - player defeats enemies through martial arts attacks to open exit doors and progress through rooms

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Variety
special_mechanics.description: Enemies have varying attacks and weapons throughout levels; affects player movement and positioning needs

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source material is Wikipedia article focused on game history, plot, and general gameplay rather than technical physics parameters. No precise movement, gravity, or sub-pixel system documentation available. Beat 'em up genre typically features responsive controls and arcade-style physics, but specific values are not documented.
